2f2f7ea9ce54.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
2f2f7ea9ce54.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
2f2f7ea9ce54.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

1a996abe3208.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
1a996abe3208.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

5830c856fe94.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
5830c856fe94.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
5830c856fe94.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

df576cfbd92f.title: Protect the 4.5/5 rating — it took years to build
df576cfbd92f.description: With 312 reviews at 4.5/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
